name: Reschedule installation after missed appointment
description: Olivia Chen contacts support in a formal tone because a technician did not arrive for a scheduled installation window. She wants to confirm what happened and book the next available appointment. The scenario evaluates whether the system can handle a straightforward scheduling request, acknowledge inconvenience, and complete the rescheduling flow without unnecessary handoffs.
expectedMilestones: Acknowledge the missed appointment and apologize
Confirm the original appointment details or service address
Capture the customer's preferred new time
